overall.description: A slow first-person exploration of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring holographic displays and neon lighting. The camera moves from a kitchenette through a living room with leather furniture, ending with a close inspection of a retro-futuristic orange boombox before panning back.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment kitchenette with counter and appliances

agents.ego_description: slowly walking along the kitchen counter, examining the microwave and food containers

entered.detail: long counter with white surface running along the left wall with bottles and appliances
purple microwave sitting on the kitchen counter
white subway tiles covering the kitchen wall behind the counter
red and white checkered food container with chopsticks on the counter
exposed ceiling with missing tiles and visible infrastructure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow kitchen area with a white tiled backsplash and counter holding a purple microwave and food containers. The camera moves slowly forward along the left wall, revealing damaged ceiling panels above and a cardboard box on the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room with holographic entertainment system and leather seating

events.description: passing the structural column from kitchen into the open plan living room area
holographic ceiling projector becomes visible overhead, casting blue-green light

agents.ego_description: moving through the living room toward the seating area, passing the leather couch

entered.detail: worn dark leather couch against the left wall with visible creases and wear
low wooden table with bottles and glasses scattered on top
circular ceiling device projecting blue-green holographic advertisements and imagery
matching worn leather armchair facing the coffee table
tall thin floor lamp illuminating the back corner

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the kitchen into a spacious living room featuring a worn leather sofa and armchair arranged around a wooden coffee table. A holographic projector hangs from the ceiling, displaying floating blue-green imagery. The space opens up significantly with mixed lighting from the hologram and warm accent lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining and storage area with wall shelving and equipment

events.description: passing under bright hanging pendant lamp with visible steam or smoke illuminated in the beam
approaching wall shelf with stacked storage boxes and orange radio equipment

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back wall past the dining table, approaching the storage shelves

entered.detail: white rectangular table with folding chairs on either side
metal folding chairs with fabric seats around the dining table
white floating shelf mounted on the back wall holding equipment
stacked green and white boxes labeled V55 on the shelf
retro-futuristic orange radio with pixel art display showing 107.5 Dark Star

segments.scene_description: Moving past the living room seating, the camera approaches a dining area with a white table and folding chairs. A bright hanging lamp illuminates steam in the air. The back wall features shelves with stacked V55 storage boxes and a distinctive orange boombox radio with a pixelated display.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage corner and wide apartment view from back wall

events.description: stopping to examine orange boombox radio closely, focusing on pixel display details
turning around to face back toward the apartment entrance, revealing full room layout

agents.ego_description: inspecting the radio on the shelf closely, then turning to survey the entire apartment from the back corner

entered.detail: closed door with exit sign above leading to the hallway
tall cabinet with glass doors containing various items

segments.scene_description: The camera closes in on the orange boombox radio, showing its pixel art display reading 107.5 Dark Star. After a moment, the camera turns back toward the entrance, revealing a wide view of the entire apartment from the back corner, with the kitchen area visible in the distance and the apartment door to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, utilitarian kitchen into a spacious, neon-lit living area. It begins by gliding forward through a narrow corridor defined by white tiled walls and a counter holding a purple microwave, passing beneath damaged ceiling panels. As the camera moves past a cardboard box on the floor, the confined space opens up significantly into a larger room. The scene then shifts from the sterile kitchen lighting to a mix of warm accent lights and the blue-green glow of a holographic projector hanging from the ceiling. Finally, the view expands to reveal a worn leather sofa and armchair arranged around a central wooden coffee table.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit living area toward a detailed focal point before expanding to reveal the full layout of the cyberpunk apartment. It begins by gliding past leather seating toward a dining area, where a bright hanging lamp illuminates drifting steam above a white table and folding chairs. As the camera approaches the back wall, the view narrows to focus on shelves of stacked storage boxes and a retro-futuristic orange boombox. The scene then closes in on the radio's pixelated display reading 107.5 Dark Star before the camera pivots away from the wall. Finally, the perspective opens up to a wide view from the back corner, encompassing the distant kitchen area and the apartment door to the right.
